semantic.role: CLI utility module for interactive user confirmation prompts and terminal input handling.
responsibilities: Parses user confirmation input from various formats (string, boolean) into a boolean result.
Prompts for explicit confirmation with a customizable message and handles raw terminal mode for single-key input.
Manages terminal state (raw mode, event listeners) to ensure proper cleanup after confirmation.
Provides colored output (green/red) for confirmation prompts using kleur.
invariants: Must handle both programmatic boolean input and interactive string input.
Must restore terminal to a clean state after interactive prompts.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, robust CLI interaction primitive for confirmation dialogs across the ArchSpine toolchain.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes to this module indicated by the git intent.

English.role: CLI utility module for interactive user confirmation prompts and terminal input handling.
responsibilities: Parses user confirmation input from various formats (string, boolean) into a boolean result.
Prompts for explicit confirmation with a customizable message and handles raw terminal mode for single-key input.
Manages terminal state (raw mode, event listeners) to ensure proper cleanup after confirmation.
Provides colored output (green/red) for confirmation prompts using kleur.

exports.name: promptForImmediateConfirmation
exports.signature:
promptForImmediateConfirmation(
  message: string,
  options: { skipNewline?: boolean } = {},
)
